nodes.name: IMPORTS
nodes.description:
This MIB is to provide TRAP support for NTP.
                hwNtpStateChangeTrap & hwNtpSysPeerChangeTrap are added to notify the 
                NTP state change & system peer change information

children.name: hwNtpState
children.description: Indicates the NTP local clock state

children.name: hwNtpCurrentClientNum
children.description: The value of this object identifies the current ntp client number.

children.name: hwNtpSourceVpnName
children.description: Indicates Vpn instance associated with the peer to which the local NTP clock is synchronized

children.name: hwNtpOldSource
children.description: Specifies server IP address to which local NTP clock was synchronized last time

children.name: hwNtpOldSourceVpnName
children.description: Indicates Vpn instance associated with the peer to which the local NTP clock is synchronized last time

children.name: hwNtpMaxDynamicSessions
children.description: The value of this object identifies the maximum dynamic session number.

children.name: hwNtpMaxPacketRecvPerSecr
children.description: The value of this object identifies the current packet numbers which ntp received.
